title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an Archon workflow that orchestrates Claude Opus for planning and copy-writing, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Opus again for integrations and deployment. The workflow generates beautiful frontends by leveraging each model's specialized strengths across different phases of development.
